stemHtml: When performing a flight in accordance with ICAO provisions, an air traffic control clearance is necessary...

options.a: when operating a VFR flight into an advisory airspace.
options.b: if the flight is operated totally or partially as a controlled flight.
options.c: prior to pass through a dangerous area.
options.d: prior to enter into an airspace class A, B, C, D, E, or F.
